sgTip: Haste + Slow are your best tools for Evrae. Slow him, Haste your party — the fight becomes trivial.

subLocations.name: Fahrenheit Deck (Evrae Approach)
subLocations.prose: The Fahrenheit is Cid's airship and the party's base of operations from here through the end of the game. Evrae is the boss fight on the deck during the approach to Bevelle — Slow it and Haste your party, and the fight becomes much more manageable. After Bevelle you return here, and Cid gives you free reign of the world map.

bosses.strategy: Have Tidus cast Slow on Evrae immediately, then Haste himself and other key party members — the speed advantage is decisive. Use the Trigger Command to pull the ship back when Evrae won't have a turn before Cid's next salvo; keeping Evrae at long range lets Cid unleash a powerful missile volley (usable up to three times). Later in the fight Evrae will cast Haste to counter your Slow — reapply Slow immediately. When Evrae is close, use physical attackers like Tidus, Auron, and Rikku; when at long range, switch to Lulu and Wakka for spells and Blitzball throws. Evrae is resistant to all elements, so non-elemental weapons and raw physicals are more reliable.

optionalAreas.name: Remiem Temple
optionalAreas.prose: Reach Remiem Temple by riding a Chocobo from the Calm Lands to the hidden eastern cliff path. The Chocobo Race here wins the Cloudy Mirror — required to unlock every Celestial Weapon in the game, so don't skip it. Belgemine challenges Yuna to a series of Aeon duels; defeating all eight earns the Moon Sigil for Nirvana. Primer XXIV is on the ground just outside the entrance.

items.name: Cloudy Mirror (Chocobo Race — required for all Celestial Weapons)
Moon Sigil (Yuna — defeat all 8 of Belgemine's Aeons)

optionalAreas.name: Cavern of the Stolen Fayth
optionalAreas.prose: Accessible from the northeast corner of the Calm Lands gorge. The cavern is challenging but manageable at this point. To recruit Yojimbo: choose 'To defeat the most powerful enemies' when asked your purpose — this lowers his price significantly. Budget at least 200,000 Gil; divide his first asking price by 2 and add 1 for a fair counter. His Zanmato ability can one-shot any enemy regardless of HP.

optionalAreas.name: Baaj Temple (Revisit)
optionalAreas.prose: Airship coordinates: X:11-16, Y:57-63. Geosgaeno guards the temple entrance — weak to Ice, hits hard. Inside, dive between the southern pillars to find Lulu's Onion Knight on the seafloor. Anima's fayth becomes accessible once you have all seven other Aeons and have collected the Destruction Sphere treasures from each Cloister.

items.name: Anima (Aeon — requires all 7 other Aeons' Cloisters complete)

optionalAreas.name: Omega Ruins
optionalAreas.prose: Airship coordinates: X:69-75, Y:33-38. The toughest optional dungeon in the game — no maps, extremely high encounter rate, and endgame-tier fiends throughout. Ultima Weapon and Omega Weapon are the two superbosses waiting inside. Primer XXVI is found within the ruins.

optionalAreas.name: Cactuar Village (Bikanel Desert Revisit)
optionalAreas.prose: Ten Cactuars are hidden across Sanubia Desert — each hides near a specific landmark or cactus patch. Speak to Marnela at the giant stone to begin the hunt. Finding all ten earns the Mercury Sigil for Rikku's Godhand. Each Cactuar encounter is a unique fight with low HP but high evasion.

optionalAreas.name: Monster Arena (Calm Lands)
optionalAreas.prose: Buy Capture weapons from the arena owner and work through every area of Spira — some monsters only appear in specific sub-zones, so explore widely. Completing the full capture list for each area unlocks arena-only creations that drop rare upgrade materials. The Mars Sigil for Auron's Masamune requires capturing at least one fiend from each of 10 different areas.

items.name: Mars Sigil (Auron — capture 1 fiend from each of 10 areas)

optionalAreas.name: Dark Aeons & Penance
optionalAreas.prose: After acquiring the Airship, Yevonite zealots station dark aeon summoners at locations throughout Spira. These super-powered aeons and the superboss they unlock are the game's ultimate challenge — expect to invest 50–100 hours of preparation. For Dark Aeon locations, strategies, and Penance, see the Superbosses page.
